name: Knowledge Base Search - Integration
description: Tests that the KnowledgeRetriever returns relevant documentation when a user describes a known issue (e.g., VPN setup).
input: A user_input describing a VPN setup issue passed to process_step.
output: ErrorResponse with error_message containing VPN setup instructions from the knowledge base.
success_criteria: KnowledgeRetriever.search_knowledge is called with the correct query
